title: vasconcellea × heilbornii
intro: Vasconcellea × heilbornii, also known as the 'Heilborn's Tumbaga', is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Tropaeolaceae. It is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis and skin irritations, due to its potential health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Vasconcellea × heilbornii is often used in infusions, tinctures, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
